ConnectionStrings._comment_pooler: Pooler connection (Port=6543) can cause connection exhaustion. Using direct connection (Port=5432) with proper pool settings instead.
ConnectionStrings._comment_supabase: Currently using Supabase PostgreSQL direct connection. Pooling configured: Max 20 connections, 30s timeout, 300s idle lifetime.

BrevoSettings._comment: Development Brevo configuration. IMPORTANT: Change SenderEmail to an email address you own and have verified in Brevo (https://app.brevo.com/settings/senders). The current address is a placeholder and will NOT work until verified.

RedisSettings._comment: Set Enabled=true and provide Upstash Redis connection string to enable Redis caching in development. When Enabled=false, application uses database-only fallback mode.

TwilioSettings._comment: Development mode: SMS messages are logged to console. Set Enabled=true with actual Twilio credentials to test SMS delivery.

SendGridSettings._comment: Development mode: Email messages are logged to console. Set Enabled=true with actual SendGrid API key to test email delivery.
